business_description.nature_of_business: Hospitality and food service operator including hotels, restaurants, and corporate office facilities located in Texas

coverages_discussed.notes: Total Insured Value across 8 locations is $168,230,000. TIV includes building, contents, and business income values. Current policy year 2024.
28 claims with $324,545 total paid and $415,934 total incurred per loss summary
8 claims with $8,780 total paid and $82,656 total incurred per loss summary

positives: Majority of locations are Fire Resistive or Masonry Non-Combustible construction
Strong equity position of $52,535,400 against total liabilities of $24,468,900
Net income of $3,220,600 indicating profitable operations
Total assets of $77,004,300 reflecting substantial balance sheet
GL losses are low in frequency and paid amounts (8 claims, $8,780 paid)
Property claims frequency is low (2 claims over loss history period)
2020 loss year showed only 2 total claims and lowest premium of $580,805.53
concerns: Workers Compensation is the dominant loss driver with 28 claims and $415,934 total incurred
Significant development on WC losses — $324,545 paid vs $415,934 incurred suggests open/developing claims
GL incurred ($82,656) is substantially higher than paid ($8,780), indicating significant reserve development
Total claim count has increased sharply in 2024 (11 claims) compared to 2023 (3 claims)
Premium has trended upward year-over-year from $580,805.53 in 2020 to $686,236.25 in 2024
Carrier has changed every year from 2020 through 2024, suggesting market instability or placement difficulty
LOC-008 Corporate Headquarters has zero building value, suggesting tenant/leased occupancy with potential coverage gap
Joisted Masonry construction at LOC-007 (Mission Cantina) presents higher fire risk relative to other locations
Restaurant occupancies (LOC-005, LOC-006, LOC-007) carry elevated fire and liability hazard
EPDM roofing at LOC-006 and LOC-007 may present wind/hail vulnerability concerns
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Five-year loss history from 2020 to 2024 across three coverages. Workers Compensation: 28 claims, $324,545 paid, $415,934 incurred. General Liability: 8 claims, $8,780 paid, $82,656 incurred. Property: 2 claims, $178,566 paid, $215,927 incurred. Total incurred across all lines: $714,517. Annual premiums ranged from $580,805.53 (2020) to $686,236.25 (2024). Carrier changed each policy year.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Hill Country Hospitality Partners, LLC operates a portfolio of 8 locations in Texas consisting of 4 hotels (The Driskill Austin, Riverwalk Suites San Antonio, Fredericksburg Inn & Spa, South Congress Motor Hotel), 3 restaurants (Blanco River Steakhouse, The Oasis at Lake Travis, Mission Cantina - Pearl District), and 1 corporate office (Corporate Headquarters in Austin). Properties span Austin, San Antonio, and Fredericksburg, TX. Building values range from $0 (leased office) to $39,760,000. Total square footage across all locations is approximately 380,500 sq ft. Year built ranges from 1998 to 2015.
